title: The Battle of the Trident: Where Kings Fell #got #shorts
description: The war was decided at the Trident. Robert Baratheon faced Rhaegar Targaryen in a battle that would end a dynasty and change Westeros forever. This is the clash that shaped history. #BattleOfTheTrident #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: The fate of Westeros was decided in a single battle—where two leaders met in a clash that would end a dynasty.
scenes.image_prompt: massive armies facing each other across a river, storm clouds above, cinematic war scale, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: At the Trident, the rebel forces and the Targaryen army gathered for a battle that would decide everything.
scenes.image_prompt: wide battlefield split by a river, armies preparing for war, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Robert Baratheon led the rebellion, driven by rage, loss, and the promise of ending the Mad King’s rule.
scenes.image_prompt: Robert raising his war hammer, battle armor, fierce expression, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Rhaegar Targaryen led the royal army, calm and composed, carrying the weight of prophecy and duty.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar in shining armor with rubies, composed and noble, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: When the battle began, thousands clashed, but all eyes were on the two men who would decide its outcome.
scenes.image_prompt: chaotic battlefield with soldiers fighting, focus on two approaching figures, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In the heart of the river, Robert and Rhaegar met—hammer against sword, fury against purpose.
scenes.image_prompt: Robert and Rhaegar fighting in shallow river water, splashes and sparks, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Their duel was brief but devastating, each strike carrying the weight of an entire kingdom.
scenes.image_prompt: close intense combat moment, impact of hammer and sword, cinematic slow motion, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: With a final blow, Robert shattered Rhaegar’s chest, sending rubies scattering across the water.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar falling as red jewels scatter in river, dramatic symbolic moment, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: With Rhaegar’s death, the Targaryen cause collapsed, and the war was effectively won.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryen army breaking as banners fall, turning point of battle, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Battle of the Trident did not just decide a war—it ended a dynasty and changed the course of history forever.
scenes.image_prompt: river flowing quietly with scattered rubies glowing beneath the water, symbolic ending, vertical 1080x1920
